name: Thank You for 10K!!! 🎉🎉🎉
description:
I couldn’t begin to say how thankful I am for reaching 10k, seriously this is a massive milestone and I promise to keep making bots, it’ll just take time. I’m honored to be able to reach 10K and I’ve got plenty of bots I want to do outside of requests as well so there isn’t a lack of content. My next bot will be Malenia for my 10k special.

Wave 8 will be announced after I post Malenia.

I’ll finish the queue for my other account, but after that I won’t be taking requests for it. I’m considering fully cutting off BruhhuhPlus but it’s less of a priority.


Again I'm very grateful to everyone following and I couldn't have reached this milestone without you guys!!!🥳🥳🥳
creator: Bruhhuh
